2244900.name: Ocean of Mermaids
2244900.description:
Ocean of Mermaids is an immersive shooter set in an open world of The Great Cauldron, a secluded ocean, inhabitants of which are imprisoned from outer world by tall impassable cliffs.

Make your way across the islands scattered in an isolated ocean full of mischief, secrets and insanity.

Ocean of Mermaids will feature:

  • Non-linear story and quests that don't hold your hand along your journey. Do it your way.
  • Horrifying creatures to fight against or sneak away from.
  • Explore the open world of The Great Cauldron on your trusty motorboat.
  • Find recepies and craft tools to aid you in your goals.
  • A wide assortiment of weapons and trinkets at your disposal.
  • Original Soundtrack
    and much more...
